selected_opportunity.title: AI Win-Loss Interview Analyzer
selected_opportunity.target_customer: Seed to Series B SaaS teams
selected_opportunity.core_problem: Revenue teams lose structured deal feedback and cannot quickly isolate churn and pipeline blockers.
selected_opportunity.offer: AI-backed win-loss interview research with weekly decision briefs.
selected_opportunity.mvp: A lightweight service that ingests call notes and CRM records, then produces ranked loss reasons and buyer-pattern summaries.
selected_opportunity.distribution_channel: Founder-led outbound to SaaS sales leaders.
selected_opportunity.reasoning: The service can start manually assisted, delivers obvious revenue impact, and creates a clean bridge into a productized reporting workflow.
next_actions: Interview five SaaS sales leaders about current win-loss workflows.
Collect three sample call-note datasets for a manual pilot.
Draft a one-page weekly decision brief format.
Package a founder-led pilot offer with a 14-day turnaround.
Define the metrics that prove deal and churn insight quality.

headline: AI Win-Loss Interview Analyzer for Seed to Series B SaaS teams
ideal_customer_profile: Seed to Series B SaaS teams with a visible budget and an urgent need to solve: Revenue teams lose structured deal feedback and cannot quickly isolate churn and pipeline blockers.
painful_problem_statement: Revenue teams lose structured deal feedback and cannot quickly isolate churn and pipeline blockers.
offer_summary: AI-backed win-loss interview research with weekly decision briefs.
mvp_scope: Deliver the narrowest paid pilot around: A lightweight service that ingests call notes and CRM records, then produces ranked loss reasons and buyer-pattern summaries.
Set up a lightweight onboarding and reporting workflow.
Ship one repeatable weekly deliverable that proves ROI quickly.
acquisition_channels: Founder-led outbound to SaaS sales leaders
sales_motion: Run direct outreach to a tightly filtered list, pitch a paid pilot, and close 2 to 3 design partners before adding product complexity.
first_30_day_plan: Week 1: define the pilot package, ICP list, and outreach assets.
Week 2: contact 30 qualified prospects and book discovery calls.
Week 3: onboard the first pilot customer and deliver the initial workflow manually.
Week 4: convert pilot feedback into a sharper offer and a repeatable case study.
success_metrics: At least 10 qualified conversations with target buyers.
2 or more paid pilot customers within 30 days.
A clear ROI signal or repeat usage pattern from pilot accounts.
biggest_risks: The pain is real but not urgent enough to trigger a purchase now.
Manual delivery takes too much effort before repeatability is proven.
Positioning is too broad to convert quickly in outbound.
mitigation_steps: Narrow the offer to one painful use case and one buyer profile.
Run the first pilots manually to learn before automating more workflow.
Use weekly feedback loops to tighten messaging and pricing after each sales call.
launch_recommendation: Launch immediately as a service-led paid pilot, keep the scope narrow, and only productize the workflow after 2 to 3 customers validate recurring demand.
